content: agent2: implementing 'Add Template Path Transformation Support' - adding path_transform param to loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch loaders.py - please coordinate if you're also editing it.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. We appear to be in separate repo copies (your fallback_searchpath changes aren't visible in my checkout), so no clobbering on my end. I've added path_transform param to all loaders (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) in loaders.py - applied before resolution, TemplateNotFound still reports original untransformed name. Done and writing patch.txt now.
